channel.title: Linux Knowledge Base on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Linux Knowledge Base on My Linux Journey

item.title: How to Reinstall initramfs, vmlinuz, and Kernel on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Learn step-by-step how to recover your Void Linux system when initramfs, vmlinuz, or kernel files are deleted, by booting from a live USB and using xbps-install with dracut.

item.title: Advanced Terminal Tips and Tricks for Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Advanced terminal tips for Linux power users. Learn bash shortcuts, aliases, functions, tmux, screen, autojump, and essential tools for productivity.

item.title: Alpine Linux Learning Plan - 6 Week Mastery Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: A structured 6-week learning plan to become an Alpine Linux specialist. Covers installation, APK, networking, diskless mode, Docker, and advanced topics.

item.title: Build Minimal Linux Distro - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to building a minimal Linux distro. Covers essential components: kernel, init (BusyBox/systemd/runit), C library, shell, and filesystem.

item.title: Install CUPS on Void Linux - Printer Setup Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing CUPS on Void Linux. Covers installation via XBPS, runit service configuration, web interface access, and printer management.

item.title: Install Pi-hole on Alpine Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing Pi-hole on Alpine Linux. Covers dependencies, installation, router DNS configuration, and admin interface access.

item.title: Install Sway on Void Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to install Sway on Void Linux. Includes seatd setup, greetd display manager, waybar configuration, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Install XFCE on Void Linux - All Methods Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive guide to installing XFCE on Void Linux. Covers meta-package, minimal components, display managers, startx, XWayland, VNC, and Docker methods.

item.title: Linux iptables Firewall Guide - Complete Tutorial
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to Linux iptables firewall. Covers tables (filter, nat, mangle), chains (INPUT, OUTPUT, FORWARD), targets (ACCEPT, DROP, REJECT), and practical firewall rules.

item.title: Linux System Information Commands - Complete Reference
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete reference for Linux system information commands. Learn to use lscpu, free, df, lsblk, lspci, ip, and other tools for monitoring.

item.title: List Installed Packages on Void Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to listing installed packages on Void Linux. Uses xbps-query to show all packages, manually installed programs, versions, and orphaned dependencies.

item.title: QEMU Windows XP - Mount Multiple CD-ROMs Tutorial
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing Windows XP in QEMU with multiple CD-ROMs. Covers ISO mounting, IDE configuration, and driver installation for multi-disc setups.

item.title: Run Alpine Linux 32-bit on QEMU - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to running Alpine Linux 32-bit on QEMU. Covers disk image creation, ISO boot, installation, and SSH configuration.

item.title: Sound Setup on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to configuring audio on Void Linux. Covers ALSA, PulseAudio, PipeWire setup, alsamixer, and troubleshooting sound issues.

item.title: SSH to QEMU VM - Fix Host Key Verification Error
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Simple guide to fix SSH host key verification errors when connecting to QEMU VMs. Uses ssh-keygen to remove old keys and reconnect safely.

item.title: Build libmount and mount from Source on Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to building libmount and mount from source. Covers util-linux compilation, library linking, and fixing version mismatches.

item.title: Configure Monitors with xrandr on Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to configuring monitors with xrandr on Linux. Create scripts to detect HDMI connections and automatically set display resolution and position.

item.title: Install Local XBPS Packages on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing downloaded XBPS packages on Void Linux manually. Uses xbps-rindex to index packages and xbps-install to install locally.

item.title: Install Windows XP on QEMU - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing Windows XP on QEMU. Covers boot configuration, virtio drivers, network setup, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Runit Service Management on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to Runit service management on Void Linux. Covers sv up, down, restart, status, and service enabling/disabling.

item.title: Transfer Files Over SSH - scp, rsync, sshfs Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to file transfer over SSH. Covers scp, rsync, sshfs mounting, and FileZilla SFTP client for secure file sharing.
